" "$margin"   printf "minimum_KiB=%s
" "$minimum" } | tee -a "$memlog" test "$margin" -ge "$minimum" flock -n /tmp/gxtb-cpu-$cpu.lock -c true {   printf "launcher_shell_pid=%s

" "$pid" > "$root/logs/build-r1-launch.pid" sleep 1 if ! kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then   wait "$pid" fi printf "launch_pid=%s
" "$pid" cat "$memlog" cat "$afflog" head -n 25 "$root/logs/build-r1-launch.log" sha256sum "$script"
